summary: The statement about Scammon's growth curve related directly addressing neurodevelopmental milestones holds accurate up until around five years old; however, it falsely implies a universal halt or reversal applicable across all types without exception which does encompass lymphatic/gonadal variations thus making 'False' an appropriate choice here despite nuances existing within each
